title: elaeoluma crispa
intro: Elaeoluma crispa, also known as the bush mango, is a tropical tree native to the rainforests of central and western Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaeoluma crispa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and its seeds are often used to make a traditional sauce or eaten raw as a nutritious snack.
